name: Kensei
description: Relies solely on his sword skills

skills.name: Sword's Path
skills.description:
Do not deal damage on hit. 

Instead charge your attack and then deal all damage at once (2s cooldown). 

Increase damage for 10% with each hit (max 5 stacks)

skills.name: Swordmaster's Instinct
skills.description: Display a skull indicator above an enemy when [b][i]Sword's Path[/i][/b] damage exceeds 120% of their health.

skills.name: Flawless Precision
skills.description: You cannot crit, but [b][i]Sword's Path[/i][/b] damage is increased by 1/2/2/3/5% for every 10% of your crit chance.

skills.name: Clean Cut
skills.description: Gain double loot when killing enemy without [b][i]Swordmaster's Instinct[/i][/b]

skills.name: Sharp Edge
skills.description: Increase [b][i]Sword's Path[/i][/b] damage per stack by 1/3/5%

skills.name: Improved Tempo
skills.description: You have 25/50/100% chance to do triple attack instead with [b][i]Master's Tempo[/i][/b]
